description: Lecture on program derived addresses (PDAs) and cross program invocations (CPIs) in Solana, covering the basics of public keys, accounts, and how different programs can interact through CPIs.
topic_summary: Discussion on PDAs and CPIs, explaining how Solana enables composability among programs. The lecture includes a recap of previous content and details on how instructions can call other instructions, forming a nested structure of execution [t=16:00].
